metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage Beginner Guide: Leveling & Progress Route
metadata.description: Start Bizarre Lineage with our first-session guide. Learn how to get your first stand, follow the fastest leveling route, and avoid common beginner mistakes.

hero.title: New players need a route for the first 30 minutes, not a wall of lore.
hero.description: This guide is structured around anxiety reduction: checklist first, mistakes second, progression path third. It should feel like a field manual you can skim between play sessions.

aside.title: Fast-start brief
aside.description: The page is optimized for overwhelmed readers. Every section exists to reduce uncertainty and point to the next useful page.

checklist.title: Give the reader a short route they can execute immediately.

first_30.title: The opening loop should stay practical.

mistakes.title: The guide should call out the most expensive beginner errors.

progression.title: Once the checklist is done, the player needs a calmer medium-term route.
